Enter short when premium_bps spikes >2σ AND funding is already positive AND OI is rising — triple crowding confirmation that historically precedes basis mean-reversion. Pre-screen at premium_bps 1.5σ if 2σ trigger count <300 in val window. Funding observed at last 8h publish, treated as regime tag not real-time signal.
synthesizer_note: Accepting despite Devil's regime-dependence concern and Quant's tight (90) trigger estimate — three orthogonal data sources combined for the first time on OI_Price short justify a Phase 3 sample; Risk caution-level only, with symbol-overlap monitoring vs live pump-long flagged as standard validation gate.

notes: Exit when basis reverts within 1σ of its causal pre-entry 30m mean (rolling window strictly ends before entry timestamp; entry-triggering spike excluded from denominator). Restricted pairing: only premium/OI-spike entry archetypes (OI_Price family + E201). Fallback to fixed SL when basis was not anomalous at entry. First condition-based exit using market-state variable as primary trigger.
synthesizer_note: Accepting with Risk's mandatory remediation baked into the spec: causal window and pairing restriction are now part of the archetype definition, not optional. Code review of the rolling-window implementation is required before deep eval — this is the gating condition for promoting from accepted to merged.

notes: Pass only signals where per-symbol realized_vol_30m is in the top tercile (rolling pre-T0 window, NOT cross-sectional or full-eval-period) AND expanding versus the prior 30m window. Applicability metadata: exclude from E001 pairing to avoid degrading the validated mean-reversion short. First regime-direction filter — orthogonal to all session/macro/weekday filters.
synthesizer_note: Accepting with Devil's E001-degradation concern resolved via explicit applicability exclusion. Per-symbol tercile and pre-T0 rolling computation now part of the spec, eliminating Quant's ambiguity flag and Risk's leakage caveat.

notes: OI burst with aggressive taker buying in high-liquidity names — port of E126 winning template to OI_Price channel where 61 archetypes registered but none in top-10.
OI burst on names where global short ratio is elevated — squeeze fuel hypothesis, mirrors E148 from pricechange to OI channel.
OI reduction with concurrent taker BUY pressure — short-cover reversal setup distinct from continuation longs.
OI burst with neutral funding (no crowding) plus extreme taker buying — clean signal without funding skew.
Triple-AND combining the three top R2 winners (taker_buy + high_liq + global_short_high) into one selective entry.
Crowded-long pump with positive funding and taker SELL dominance — classic mean-reversion fade with natural SL=TP symmetry.
Smart money positioned short while retail funding extreme — high-conviction fade short.
Crash with retail capitulation extreme + early taker buy reversal — counter-trend bounce.
Single-filter Reserved6 long — minimal AND to preserve sparse R6 trigger count (~120 baseline).
R6 long gated only by high liquidity — sparse-channel safe filter.
Session-gated entry restricting pricechange longs to US trading hours — exploits liquidity regime.
Pump with extreme basis AND premium — perp dislocation fade.
Pure time_only 60s exit paired with high-conviction entries — quick mean-reversion harvest before drift.
Trail family with 2.0% step on top entries — wider trail to avoid premature stop-out.
Two-step TP ladder 60/40 with first TP at 0.5% second at 1.5% — captures bulk early.
Breakeven kernel with stricter trigger threshold and 30s activation — differentiates from X100 floor.
Hybrid: take 50% at fixed 0.5% TP, trail remaining 50% with 1.5% step — symmetric risk/reward.
Pricechange and OI_Price both fire within 60 seconds with taker_buy confirmation — tight double-channel timing window.
Three-channel alignment requiring funding-neutral regime — avoids crowded-trade traps.
Risk archetype enforcing position size only when both liquidity and taker_buy confirm — kelly-safe sizing.
庄家在小盘币加仓拉升时，OI 增长叠加小市值更容易形成控盘主升。Round 4 主线是跟随庄家加仓而不是反手猜顶。
低流动性币种被庄家少量资金推动时，OI 上升是加仓控盘的直接痕迹。该 archetype 捕捉低深度下的拉升延续。
OI_Price 频道中主动买盘占优，说明不是普通波动而是庄家边拉升边吃单。单维度给 GPU 独立判断买盘强度的空间。
极端 taker buy 代表庄家或跟随盘集中扫货。该信号更少但更像控盘启动点，并避免两条件 AND 超额。
价格上涨但 OI 回落，常见于空头被庄家挤爆后的被动平仓。该 long 逻辑捕捉 shorts capitulation 后的延续。
价格下跌叠加 OI 收缩，说明杠杆仓位被庄家打穿并触发连锁出清。用于测试控盘砸盘阶段的 short continuation。
OI 上升同时正 funding 极端，容易是散户追多拥挤，庄家可利用多头堆积反向收割。该 short 只用两条件避免 Round 3 三连过拟合。
负 funding 极端说明空头拥挤，若 OI 继续扩张，庄家可能借势拉爆空头。该 long 捕捉反身性 squeeze。
头部交易员仓位偏多可作为庄家或聪明钱站队的代理信号。单维度保留给 GPU 判断是否独立有效。
头部仓位偏空时，小妖币可能进入庄家派发或砸盘阶段。该单信号用于和 long 侧智能仓位形成 OR 式兄弟测试。
全市场空头占比极端时，庄家常用快速拉升制造空头踩踏。该 archetype 专测散户站错边后的 long squeeze。
全市场多头占比极端时，庄家更容易通过向下插针清算追多盘。该 short 是 retail trap 的反向兄弟信号。
永续相对指数明显溢价，可能代表庄家在合约端主动抬价并吸引跟随盘。单维度测试 premium dislocation 是否能识别控盘。
新上市小币信息不充分、筹码结构轻，常是庄家控盘拉升的高发区域。该单维度用于捕捉新币妖币化。
美盘流动性集中时，庄家拉升更容易吸引跟随资金和合约量。该单维度测试 session regime 是否改善 OI 主线。
24h 成交量进入顶部分位，常是庄家启动吸引注意力后的量能确认。单维度保留给 OI channel 观察是否独立贡献。
Reserved6 本身已是极端波动事件，小市值条件足够表达妖币控盘土壤。保持单条件避免稀疏频道被过度过滤。
低流动性极端波动更像庄家用较小资金制造主升段。R6 样本稀疏，因此只保留一个控盘代理条件。
极端波动中若主动买盘占优，通常不是普通噪声而是控盘拉升的吃单痕迹。该 long 测试 R6 的最强买盘形态。
R6 极端波动叠加散户空头拥挤，容易演化为庄家拉爆空头。单维度让稀疏事件保留足够样本。
头部仓位偏多时的 R6 极端信号，可能对应庄家提前站位后的快速拉升。该设计测试聪明钱与极端波动的共振。
新上市币在 R6 极端事件中更可能出现庄家控盘和筹码真空。单条件用于最大化稀疏样本可用性。
合约溢价显著时，极端拉升可能由庄家在永续端先行推动。该 archetype 捕捉 perp 溢价带来的控盘痕迹。
R6 极端波动若伴随顶部分位成交量，更像庄家制造 attention 后的放量主升。保持单维度以免错过稀有妖币。
多头拥挤时的 R6 极端波动可能是庄家高位收割和插针。该 short 与空头陷阱 long 形成兄弟测试。
头部仓位偏空叠加 R6 极端事件，可能对应庄家派发后的砸盘。单条件保留足够触发数。
正 funding 极端说明追多拥挤，R6 极端波动中庄家更容易反向清算多头。该 short 避免与低流动性三连绑定。
负 funding 极端代表空头拥挤，R6 的快速波动可能被庄家用来触发空头踩踏。该 long 保持宽过滤。
pricechange 只有叠加小市值控盘土壤才值得纳入，避免回到纯价格动量。该 long 测试 smallcap pump 的庄家拉升延续。
低流动性是小妖币被庄家快速拉动的核心条件。该 pricechange 条目用操纵难度而非单纯涨跌幅做过滤。
主动买盘占优说明价格变化背后有真实吃单推动，更贴近庄家拉升痕迹。用于替代 Round 3 的纯 pricechange baseline。
极端主动买入是庄家扫货或跟随盘失衡的强信号。该单维度让 GPU 判断强买盘在 PC 频道的价值。
成交量进入顶部分位时，pricechange 更可能是庄家制造关注度后的拉升。该信号避免无控盘特征的价格动量。
头部仓位偏多可作为庄家或聪明钱提前站位的代理。结合 pricechange 频道测试拉升是否已有资金站队。
散户空头极端拥挤时，价格上冲可能是庄家主动触发 squeeze。该 long 专测 pricechange 中的空头陷阱。
散户多头极端拥挤时，庄家更容易通过快速下砸完成收割。该 short 是 PC 频道的多头陷阱检测。
正 funding 极端代表追多拥挤，pricechange 信号若无庄家继续承接可能转为收割。该 short 单独测试 funding trap。
新上市币的价格变化更容易被筹码集中和信息不对称放大。该 long 捕捉新币妖币化的庄家拉升特征。
跨频道双触发由外层 channel=* 组合承接，novel_dim 只放可解析的 OI 扩张与极端买盘。该设计寻找庄家加仓和 pricechange 同时出现的 60s 共振。
OI 扩张叠加散户多头极端，跨频道若同时触发 pricechange，可能是庄家诱多后的收割窗口。该 short 专测 60s 双触发中的多头陷阱。
妖币 fixed 宽 TP 的低端探针，避免 R3 的 <1% fee trap。偏 2h-5h hold，用 3% SL 给正常洗盘留空间。
覆盖 TP=10%、SL=10% 角点，测试妖币强洗盘后的均衡退出。偏 2h-5h hold，适合波动极大的庄家控盘段。
Balanced wide-TP fixed exit，5x 非对称，覆盖 5h p50 以上主升段。SL=5% 容忍妖币常见回撤，偏 3h-5h hold。
面向妖币 5h p75-p90 区间的 fixed runner，给庄家拉升留出更大空间。SL=7% 防止被中途洗盘洗出，偏 4h-5h hold。
瞄准 D1 5h p90 附近的右尾收益，避免过早止盈。SL=7% 仍在用户要求 10% 内，偏 5h hold。
测试妖币过百收益的 fixed super-runner，匹配 D1 p99 级别事件。SL=10% 是上限容忍，用于不被庄家深洗震出，偏 5h hold。
覆盖 D1 5h max 约 209% 附近的 extreme-tail fixed exit。适合少数爆拉妖币，偏 5h hold，SL 控制在 10%。
覆盖 TP=350% 角点，为 5h 外或极端庄家拉升预留安全上限。SL=10% 保持用户约束，偏 5h hold 与后续长 hold 扩展。
Trail family 中 sl_pct 即 trail step，2% 用于较紧跟随但仍远宽于 R3 噪声级 trail。适合妖币快速拉升后的 2h-4h hold。
4% trail step 平衡锁利和放任奔跑，适合妖币主升段中等洗盘。偏 3h-5h hold，测试 dynamic exit 是否优于 fixed。
6% loose trail 给庄家控盘币留更大回撤空间，目标是吃完整段而非半路下车。偏 4h-5h hold。
重复 4% step 但明确面向 5h 右尾事件，作为 balanced trail 的 hold 偏好变体。用于检验 5h p90 级拉升中 trail 的锁利能力。
15% 触发 BE 后继续骑到 hold close，修复 R3 BE 触发过小的问题。SL=5% 适配妖币初段洗盘，偏 3h-5h hold。
30% BE trigger 对应妖币常见主升确认，触发后把本金风险降到入场点。SL=7% 容忍前置震荡，偏 5h hold。
50% 后才移动到 BE，避免太早 ratchet 破坏右尾收益。适合庄家持续拉升后的 4h-5h hold。
100% BE trigger 测试极端妖币翻倍后保本骑乘，匹配 D1 p99 右尾。SL=10% 用于承受深洗，偏 5h hold。
GPU kernel 硬编码 50/50，TP=25% 表示先在 12.5% 锁半仓、再冲 25%。这是可评估的妖币浅层 ladder，偏 2h-5h hold。
50/50 ladder 用 25% 隐含 TP1 和 50% TP2 捕捉中等右尾。SL=7% 适合庄家控盘洗盘，偏 3h-5h hold。
50/50 ladder 用 50% 隐含 TP1 和 100% TP2，面向过百妖币收益。SL=10% 控制最大试错，偏 5h hold。
更轻 SL 的 50/50 ladder，隐含 25% TP1 后让剩余半仓冲 50%。用于比较同 TP2 下 SL=5 与 SL=7/10 的妖币适配度，偏 3h-5h hold。
Exit when funding flips against position AND OI starts decaying — orthogonal microstructure trigger before price reverses.
synthesizer_note: Devil flagged funding 8h cadence (slow flip rate) — accept anyway as paper-shadow signal; Quant ample (~2400), Risk acceptable. First exit kernel pairing funding sign-flip with OI decay.

notes: Exit position when smart-money top-trader position ratio enters decline regime — leading indicator of impending reversal.
synthesizer_note: 5min snapshot lag acceptable for >10min holds; Risk requires verification _dec resolves via backward-rolling slope only — flag in monitor not blocker.

notes: Lock breakeven when premium_bps collapses to neutral band — premium decay signals exhaustion of the futures-spot spread driver.
synthesizer_note: Devil+Quant flag possible degeneracy (modal range for liquid perps); accept-with-watch — if >30% of fires are <30s post-entry, retune band to ±2 bps in R5.

notes: Quick exit when basis_rate normalizes to ±1% band — basis convergence often precedes mean reversion in perp markets.
synthesizer_note: Scale ambiguity (decimal vs bps) must be resolved at data-loader before scoring; accept for paper-shadow with first-100-fires distribution dump as Devil suggested.

notes: Tighten trailing stop when volume drops below p25 — momentum exhaustion signal that classical trail kernels ignore.
synthesizer_note: Cleanest of the exit batch — Devil seems_ok, Quant ample (~1250), Risk acceptable pending p25 backward-rolling verification.

notes: Close long when 5m taker buy ratio inverts below 0.45 — aggressive sellers taking control of order flow.
synthesizer_note: Devil flags risk of early-exit on profitable pullbacks; pair with breakeven kernels (not trail) — paper-shadow must compare vs counterfactual fixed-TP hold.

notes: Widen TP and tighten SL during US session — different volatility regime than Asian; static exits underperform across sessions.
synthesizer_note: session=US already binds the upper hour bound (canonically ≤21 UTC); engine-side TP/SL multipliers must actually deviate from baseline for this kernel to differentiate.

notes: Long when OI surges with deeply negative funding AND discount premium — classic short-squeeze setup with three orthogonal confirmations.
synthesizer_note: Quant estimates ~18 triggers/30d (too_few) — accept-with-watch; Risk caution on live BWE_OI_Price_monitor pump-long overlap, paper-shadow must enforce one-position-per-symbol cap across research+live pools.

notes: Short pump events when top-trader ratio is already crowded long — fade smart-money exhaustion with volume confirmation.
synthesizer_note: Cleanest entry of the batch — Devil seems_ok, Quant tight (~62 triggers, adequate), Risk acceptable; 5min top_trader staleness is a known cross-batch caveat.

notes: Short when basis blows out >5% AND premium extreme AND OI surging — classic perp overheating, mean reversion setup.
synthesizer_note: Sample ~8 (too_few) and basis_rate scale ambiguity (5% vs 5bps) flagged; accept for option value — high-conviction overheating signature, retune threshold after first run if zero triggers.

notes: Long Reserved6 crashes when global retail is extremely short AND volume is top-decile — squeeze fuel meets capitulation.
synthesizer_note: Sample ~6 (too_few) but R6/long is empirically alive (E316-E327 lift +0.343); accept for high-EV thin sample, enforce 1-position-per-symbol cap due to concentration risk.

notes: Gate trades to mid-cap symbols during US session with healthy volume — best signal-to-noise band per session-cap analysis.
synthesizer_note: Clean accept — first joint session × marketcap × volume filter in 121 filters; Devil seems_ok, Quant ample (~735), Risk acceptable pending quote_volume_24h trailing-window verification.

notes: Only allow trades on low-liquidity symbols with funding extreme but excluding ultra-new listings — wild-but-not-untested universe.
synthesizer_note: Slippage divergence is the main concern (Devil+Risk both flag); MANDATE realistic-fill paper-shadow with ≥25% edge haircut before any combo using F123 is promoted to live.

notes: Trigger long only when OI_Price pump AND pricechange pump fire within 30s of each other AND taker flow confirms — synchronous multi-channel agreement.
synthesizer_note: 30s sync constraint is descriptive, not parser-enforced — effective archetype is single-channel oi+pump+taker; Risk flags HIGH live conflict with BWE_OI_Price_monitor pump-long bot, paper-shadow must model combined-exposure cap.

notes: Short Reserved6 events when OI_Price already flagged within 60s AND symbol is low-liquidity AND retail is leaning long — liquidation cascade setup.
synthesizer_note: Sample ~16 (too_few), tautology (OI→R6 may be same event) + low-liq slippage concerns; accept-with-watch — verify OI→R6 gap >5s in historical alerts, mandate ≥30% slippage haircut for shorts.

notes: Exit when smart-money top-trader position ratio drops post-entry — they are unwinding before retail catches the reversal.
synthesizer_note: Clean smart-money rip-cord; orthogonal to X083 (delta-event) by using state-flag semantics.

notes: Exit when funding rate has crossed back into normal band from extreme — extreme-funding alpha is gone.
synthesizer_note: Differs from X080 flip; mean-reversion regime exit. Devil's 8h-cadence note is monitoring guidance, not a blocker.

notes: For long entries — exit when global_long_ratio decays out of the high band, signaling crowd flip.
synthesizer_note: First sentiment-flip exit family; pairs with crowd-condition long entries.

notes: Long exit watchdog — close when premium falls out of the extreme band, removing the premium-squeeze rationale.
synthesizer_note: Direction-distinct from X081 (entry-into vs leave-of premium-extreme).

notes: Force-close any open position at US-session END (literal reading of session=US dim — i.e. trades held during US session get closed at session boundary).
synthesizer_note: Devil flagged dim/notes-direction mismatch; resolved by adopting literal-dim reading (close at end of US session, not before US open) and rewording notes accordingly.

notes: Hold for fixed time window unless premium crosses into the opposite extreme — then early exit; combines time + state-change.
synthesizer_note: Hybrid time+state composition not present in the 5 base kernels.

notes: Breakeven once unrealized hits TP/2, then add a funding-flip rip-cord — exits if the funding regime inverts.
synthesizer_note: Devil's flag-vs-event note: kernel must read the transition OUT of top decile as trigger; verify in paper-shadow.

notes: Exit once realized volume in the post-entry window drops into the bottom quartile — momentum has died. Trigger window must be ≥90s post-entry to avoid clipping R6 structural post-event volume collapse.
synthesizer_note: Inverse of X079; Devil's R6-clipping concern absorbed into notes as ≥90s guard.

notes: Short when OI collapses sharply with high volume on a liquid pair — leveraged longs being flushed, expect mean reversion.
synthesizer_note: Quant ~7 triggers/30d (too_few) — accept-with-watch; if first GPU pass shows <30 triggers, relax liquidity_bucket gate. Risk caution on live-overlap with OI_Price pump-long: log same-symbol collisions before any promotion.

notes: Long when both premium and basis are deeply negative — perp under-priced relative to spot, structural arbitrage support.
synthesizer_note: Quant ~12 triggers/30d (too_few) — accept-with-watch; track realized round-trip cost, abandon if mean cost >25bps per Devil.

notes: R6 extreme-move short, restricted to US session and large-cap only — best execution venue, lowest slippage tail.
synthesizer_note: First R6 archetype with real trigger-set narrowing vs the duplicate-score E316–E333 set; per Risk caution, monitor symbol-level distribution and add per-symbol throttle if >50% land on 1-2 names.

notes: Long on OI_Price when aggressive buying meets crowded shorts AND funding is non-positive — squeeze fuel without paying funding tax.
synthesizer_note: Quant ~28 triggers/30d (too_few) and Risk HIGH live-conflict with existing OI_Price pump-long live strategy. Accept-with-watch ONLY for backtest/paper; before any live promotion, gate with ±5min same-symbol live-overlap skip per Risk remediation.

notes: Pump event short — fade when top traders are decreasing position AND premium is hot; retail-driven exhaustion setup.
synthesizer_note: Smart-money-fade entry adequate sample (~125). Risk caution on top_trader_position_ratio_dec window semantics — verify SUPPORTED_FIELDS interprets it as trailing, not forward; downgrade to exit-only if forward.

notes: Risk archetype that down-sizes by 50% on low-liquidity bucket trades to keep slippage tail bounded under compound replay.
synthesizer_note: Directly addresses R2 E126 paper-bleed lesson; new mean/Kelly metrics will reward left-tail compression.

notes: Skip entries when BOTH funding-abs and premium are in their extreme bands — over-stretched market, mean-reversion risk to existing positions.
synthesizer_note: AND-composite distinct from existing single-flag filters; ~200 skips/30d is fine for a SKIP filter.

notes: Cross-channel veto — when OI_Price and pricechange fire on the same symbol with opposite sides within 90s, skip both. session=US gate restricts to high-liquidity hours.
synthesizer_note: Quant flagged temporal/cross-channel logic is NOT in SUPPORTED_FIELDS — kernel must consume type=cross_channel metadata for conflict-skip to actually fire; verify in paper-shadow before promotion.

notes: When pricechange and Reserved6 fire same direction within 120s on a high-liquidity name, size-boost x1.5; double-channel confirmation = high-quality. Boost capped so post-boost notional ≤12% of capital, and forbidden when another open BWE position exists on same symbol.
synthesizer_note: Risk HIGH concentration on 1.5x boost over 5-10% base — incorporated 12% notional cap and same-symbol veto into notes per Risk remediation. Same CC-kernel verification caveat as C065.

notes: Filter out symbols listed under 180 days — avoid new-listing volatility regime where historical kline patterns are unreliable.
synthesizer_note: First age-based filter; supports historical pattern validity for the entire entry roster.

notes: Exit when basis is in the non-positive regime post-entry; structural carry rationale removed. State-predicate reading — for entries already in basis≤0, exit will fire near T0+ε which the GPU loop will surface in time-to-exit distribution.
synthesizer_note: Quant flagged near-name overlap with X084 (exit_on_basis_invert) — accept anyway because the supported-field encoding (basis<=0 state) differs from X084's transition semantics; let GPU/paper-shadow distinguish via TP/SL surface and time-to-exit mode.

notes: Close position when premium_extreme flag deactivates and premium_bps reverts below 5, capturing premium-mean-reversion exhaustion.
synthesizer_note: Novel premium-flip exit not in 142-exit registry; Devil flagged instant-trigger risk if paired entry lacks premium_extreme gate — recommend pairing only with premium-gated entries to avoid wash trades.

notes: Exit when smart-money position ratio flips from positive decile back to neutral, indicating informed flow has unwound.
synthesizer_note: Smart-money-flip exit unique in registry; 5m cadence lag (Devil) tolerable for non-scalping holds — track slippage-to-signal in monitor; one of 4 top_trader-gated archetypes (Risk multitest watch).

notes: For shorts entered during funding-extreme regime, exit when funding decays out of top decile, locking gains before squeeze risk rises.
synthesizer_note: Clean funding-decile decay exit; all critics seems_ok with ample sample estimate (~300 trig/30d).

notes: Move stop to breakeven on first +0.3% favorable, then exit only when top_trader_position_ratio crosses against the trade direction.
synthesizer_note: Composite BE + smart-money trail; watch BE-hit-rate vs. trail-fire-rate — if BE dominates >80%, trail half is dead weight. Top_trader-decile family member (multitest cap monitor).

notes: Exit position when retail long/short ratio crosses out of extreme bucket (contrarian regime ends), regardless of P&L state.
synthesizer_note: Retail-extreme decay exit never used in registry; sample adequate but exit-fire-rate may fall below 15% if not paired with retail-gated entries — accept-with-watch on degradation to time_only baseline.

notes: Take 50% off at session boundary (US→Asian or Asian→European), trail rest with native exit, hedging session-specific reversal risk.
synthesizer_note: Session-boundary partial-close composition not in 5 native kernels; CRITICAL post-run check: if val_score equals channel/side baseline, this is the R1 silent-fall-through pattern — verify partial-then-trail kernel hook before merge.

notes: Short exit triggered when 5m taker-buy ratio flips from <=0.4 (sellers dominant) to >=0.6 (buyers regaining), signaling short-cover risk.
synthesizer_note: Clean aggressor-flip exit; if flip-then-reflip rate >30% in monitor, add ≥2-consecutive-window guard in implementation.

notes: Hold short as runner while OI continues collapsing (oi_change_pct<=-10), exit only when OI stops decreasing — rides full liquidation cascade.
synthesizer_note: Most promising exit in batch — Devil and Quant both flagged as cleanest cascade-runner composition; track max-favorable-excursion vs. realized exit price to verify tail-capture.

notes: Long mean-reversion on small-cap low-liquidity dumps where retail is extreme short — symmetric SL=TP target around natural ATR.
synthesizer_note: Sample tight (~15 trig/30d) and global_short_ratio may be NaN for smallcaps (Devil concern); accept-with-watch — REQUIRED: paper-shadow with explicit slippage haircut and verify global_short_ratio populated for >70% of triggers before any promote.

notes: Short Reserved6 8-15% pumps when smart money sits in low decile + OI top decile + premium >=15bps — fade retail-driven extreme moves.
synthesizer_note: Triple-orthogonal Reserved6/short rare in registry; Quant estimates only ~3 trig/30d — accept-with-watch, may need 60-90d evaluation window. Member of top_trader-decile family (multitest cap monitor).

notes: Long Reserved6 events when funding deeply negative + retail extremely short — primed for short-squeeze continuation.
synthesizer_note: Reserved6 contrarian-long thin sample (~4 trig/30d); Risk flagged live-conflict with OI&Price pump-long bot — paper-shadow MUST track concurrent-position events on same symbol; flag if same-symbol exposure exceeds 15% of capital in any 5min window.

notes: Short Asian-session small-cap low-liq pumps with move_pct>=5 — exploits known Asian-session retail FOMO + thin book.
synthesizer_note: 4 supported conditions; sample tight (~45) and Risk flagged single-symbol concentration risk — track per-symbol trigger histogram, flag if top-2 symbols >40% of triggers.

notes: Long pricechange when volume above p75 + funding negative + retail short_high — captures pre-squeeze setup with confirmed flow.
synthesizer_note: Cleanest entry in batch with ample sample (~31); track lift vs. existing pc_pump_neg_funding_long baseline to confirm volume_p75 gate adds value over volume_top_decile. Live-conflict watch with pump-long bot.

notes: Restrict any entry to US session AND premium_extreme AND funding_abs_high — high-conviction regime gate to reduce false positives.
synthesizer_note: Triple regime filter not in 125 existing filters; restrictive (~1% pass rate) — track per-entry trigger when applied, drop filter if any gated entry falls below 30 triggers.

notes: Long when pricechange channel fires first then OI_Price confirms within ~60s with OI-pump + volume-decile + neg funding — sequential confirmation pattern.
synthesizer_note: Two pre-promote requirements (Risk): (1) verify loop has cross-channel temporal join primitive — without it, the 'within_60s' clause silently drops and reduces to 3-gate pc/long entry; (2) verify entry timestamp anchored at OI-confirm time, not earlier price event, to avoid leakage. Live-bot-position guard required against pump-long bot.
